settings.encrypt_storage_explanation_description_: S…õ woma Korae…õ Kyekyere kwan a, …õde banb…î fofor…î ka wo app no ho denam …îkwan a w…îfa so kora wo ns…õm w…î wo afidie so no banb…î so. Yei ma …õy…õ den ma obiara s…õ …îb…õnya wo ns…õm a …înni kwan.

S…õ wodum amane…õb…î a, …õb…õyi saa ns…õm yi nyinaa afiri server no so. Bio nso, s…õ wopepa sika kotokuo firi app no mu a, …õb…õyi ns…õm a …õfa ho no nso afiri server no so.

multisig.ms_help_1: Sika Korabea no ne BlueWallet app afofor…î ne sika kotokuo a w…îne PSBT hyia, te s…õ Electrum, Specter, Coldcard, Cobo Vault, ne afofor…î b…õy…õ adwuma.
multisig.ms_help_2: Wobetumi ay…õ Sika Korabea safoa nyinaa w…î saa afidie yi so na woayi anaa woasesa akyire yi. S…õ safoa nyinaa w…î afidie kor…î no ara so a, ne banb…î ne Bitcoin sika kotokuo a …õy…õ daa no banb…î y…õ p…õ.
multisig.ms_help_3: W…î sika kotokuo akwan no so no, wob…õhunu wo Sika Korabea backup ne watch-only backup. Saa backup yi te s…õ asase mfonini a …õkyer…õ wo sika kotokuo no. ∆êho hia ma sika kotokuo nsangye…õ s…õ …õba s…õ wo aba no mu baako yera a.
multisig.ms_help_title4: Sika Korabea a W…îde Ba Mu
multisig.ms_help_4: S…õ wop…õ s…õ wode multisig ba mu a, fa wo backup file ne Import adey…õ no di dwuma. S…õ aba ne XPUB nko ara na wow…î a, wobetumi de Import b…ît…în no a …õy…õ baako baako adi dwuma bere a woreb…î Sika Korabea safoa no.
multisig.ms_help_5: S…õ wonsesa hwee a, BlueWallet b…õy…õ 2-w…î-3 Sika Korabea. S…õ wop…õ s…õ woy…õ quorum soronko anaa wosesa address su no, ma Advanced Mode kwan w…î Nhyehy…õe…õ no mu.
